nasb.text: But a man must examine himself, and in so doing he is to eat of the bread and drink of the cup.

esv.text: Let a person examine himself, then, and so eat of the bread and drink of the cup.

cnv.text: 所以人應當省察自己，然後才吃這餅，喝這杯。

ccb.text: 所以，人要先自我省察，才可以吃这饼喝这杯。

csbs.text: 这样，一个人应当省察自己，然后才吃这饼、喝这杯。
